heading: Cost of operation and maintenance of general navigation features of small boat harbor projects; applicable projects
label: 577b Cost of operation and maintenance of general navigation features of small boat harbor projects; applicable projects
text: The cost of operation and maintenance of the general navigation features of small boat harbor projects shall be borne by the United States. This section shall apply to any such project authorized (A) under section 201 of the Flood Control Act of 1965 [], (B) under section 107 of the River and Harbor Act of 1960 [], (C) between , and , under authority of this Act, and to projects heretofore authorized in accordance with the policy set forth in the preceding sentence and to such projects authorized in this Act or which are hereafter authorized.42 U.S.C. 1962d–533 U.S.C. 577January 1, 1970December 31, 1970
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, means , , . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 91–61184 Stat. 1818Dec. 31, 1970Hereafter, referred to in text, probably means after .Dec. 31, 1970

Amendments1974— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “The costs of operation and maintenance of the general navigation features of small boat harbor projects authorized between , and , under the authority of this Act, section 201 of the Flood Control Act of 1965 [], or section 107 of the River and Harbor Act of 1960 [], shall be borne by the United States.”Pub.
